languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor lets out a morose chuckle.{/n} "Well. Perhaps none of this has been worth the effort from the start.... I will ask one thing of my heir — protect the dynasty. Protect—"

languages.text: {n}Предок издает угрюмый смешок.{/n} "Что ж. Пожалуй, все это с самого начала не стоило потраченных усилий... Об одном прошу: сберегите династию, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Сберегите..."
{n}Your ancestor lets out a morose chuckle.{/n} "Well. Perhaps none of this has been worth the effort from the start.... I will ask one thing of my heir — protect the dynasty. Protect—"
languages.original_text: {n}Предок издает угрюмый смешок.{/n} "Что ж. Пожалуй, все это с самого начала не стоило потраченных усилий... Об одном прошу: сберегите династию, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Сберегите..."

{n}Your ancestor lets out a morose chuckle.{/n} "Well. Perhaps none of this has been worth the effort from the start.... I will ask one thing of my heir — protect the dynasty. Protect—"
{n}Your ancestor lets out a morose chuckle.{/n} "Well. Perhaps none of this has been worth the effort from the start.... I will ask one thing of my heir — protect the dynasty. Protect—"

languages.text: {n}Tu ancestro deja escapar una risita taciturna.{/n} «Bueno, tal vez nada de esto mereciera la pena desde un principio... Quiero pedirle una cosa a mi hereder{mf|o|a}: proteja la dinastía. Proteja...».
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor lets out a morose chuckle.{/n} "Well. Perhaps none of this has been worth the effort from the start.... I will ask one thing of my heir — protect the dynasty. Protect—"

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu ancestro deja escapar una risita taciturna.{/n} «Bueno, tal vez nada de esto mereciera la pena desde un principio... Quiero pedirle una cosa a mi hereder{mf|o|a}: proteja la dinastía. Proteja...».

languages.text: {n}你的先祖苦笑一声。{/n}“好吧。或许从一开始，这一切就不值得……我只想嘱托我的继承人一件事，守护王朝。守护——”
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor lets out a morose chuckle.{/n} "Well. Perhaps none of this has been worth the effort from the start.... I will ask one thing of my heir — protect the dynasty. Protect—"

traits.locale_text: {n}你的先祖苦笑一声。{/n}“好吧。或许从一开始，这一切就不值得……我只想嘱托我的继承人一件事，守护王朝。守护——”

languages.text: {n}Votre ancêtre laisse échapper un petit rire morose.{/n} « Ma foi, peut-être que rien de tout cela n'en a jamais valu la peine... Je ne demanderai qu'une chose à mon {mf|héritier|héritière} : protégez la dynastie. Protégez... »
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor lets out a morose chuckle.{/n} "Well. Perhaps none of this has been worth the effort from the start.... I will ask one thing of my heir — protect the dynasty. Protect—"

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre ancêtre laisse échapper un petit rire morose.{/n} « Ma foi, peut-être que rien de tout cela n'en a jamais valu la peine... Je ne demanderai qu'une chose à mon {mf|héritier|héritière} : protégez la dynastie. Protégez... »

languages.text: {n}Atan, somurtkan bir kıkırdama koyuveriyor.{/n} "Belki de bunların hiçbiri, en başından bunca çabaya değmezmiş... Vârisimden tek bir şey isteyeceğim. Hanedanlığı koru..."
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor lets out a morose chuckle.{/n} "Well. Perhaps none of this has been worth the effort from the start.... I will ask one thing of my heir — protect the dynasty. Protect—"

traits.locale_text: {n}Atan, somurtkan bir kıkırdama koyuveriyor.{/n} "Belki de bunların hiçbiri, en başından bunca çabaya değmezmiş... Vârisimden tek bir şey isteyeceğim. Hanedanlığı koru..."

languages.text: {n}Dein Ahnherr stößt ein mürrisches Lachen aus.{/n} "Gut. Vielleicht war von Anfang an nichts hiervon die Mühe wert ... Ich bitte {mf|meinen Erben|meine Erbin} nur um eines ... beschützt die Dynastie. Beschützt ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Your ancestor lets out a morose chuckle.{/n} "Well. Perhaps none of this has been worth the effort from the start.... I will ask one thing of my heir — protect the dynasty. Protect—"

traits.locale_text: {n}Dein Ahnherr stößt ein mürrisches Lachen aus.{/n} "Gut. Vielleicht war von Anfang an nichts hiervon die Mühe wert ... Ich bitte {mf|meinen Erben|meine Erbin} nur um eines ... beschützt die Dynastie. Beschützt ..."

languages.text: {n}祖先が悲しげに笑う。{/n}「そうか。最初からこの努力は無駄だったのかもしれない…。ただ一つ、後継者に頼む。王朝を守れ。守れと」
